typography.strategy: High-contrast geometric sans for Arabic, prioritizing legibility and sporty tension. Numbers in stats use heavy weights (800/900) with tight tracking.

colors.strategy: Deep dark background (#0A0A0A) punctuated by electric lime/emerald accents to evoke the energy of a floodlit football pitch at night. Light mode uses clean white with deep emerald.

visual_enhancers.glowing_avatar: A vibrant, pulsating ring using framer-motion around the avatar. The ring's color is customizable by the user (simulating team colors). It uses a heavy blur for an outer glow and a crisp 2px inner solid border.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for floating action buttons or sticky tab headers. Heavy backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-xl) with a delicate 1px border (border-white/10).
visual_enhancers.neumorphism: Not used to avoid muddiness; strictly sharp, high-contrast borders and glows.
visual_enhancers.animated_background: The cover photo area has a subtle, slow pan/zoom animation using Framer Motion to keep the page feeling alive, overlaid with a subtle dark gradient.

grids_and_layouts.strategy: Mobile-first responsive. RTL aligned (dir='rtl'). High density Bento grid for stats to mimic a tactical dashboard.
grids_and_layouts.stats_bento: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 or gap-4. Items are strictly rectangular with minimal border radius (rounded-xl) for a 'sports stat card' feel.
grids_and_layouts.profile_header: Stacked layout. Cover image full width (h-48 to h-64). Avatar positioned absolute (-bottom-12 right-6 for RTL). Name and bio below with sufficient padding-top to clear the avatar.

motion.avatar_glow: Pulse and slow rotation of a conical gradient border or box-shadow to simulate an energetic glow.
motion.tabs: Framer motion shared layout animation for the active tab indicator (a bold primary colored underline or pill).
motion.content_list: Staggered fade up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) for feed items to make scrolling feel energetic.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure muted text against background meets 4.5:1. Primary text on primary bg must be dark (black) for legibility.
accessibility.rtl: Always use logical CSS properties where possible (ps, pe, ms, me, text-start) and ensure Framer motion animations account for RTL (e.g., flip x-axis translations or rely on y-axis/opacity).
accessibility.aria: Include data-testid on all interactive elements. Use aria-selected for tabs.

ProfilePage.description: Main page container, handling edit mode state, fetching user data, and managing layout.

ProfileHeader.description: Contains the animated cover background, glowing avatar, user info (name, handle, bio), and action buttons (Edit Profile, Settings).

GlowingAvatar.description: Avatar with a customizable, animated glowing border using Framer Motion.

StatCard.description: A bento-style card for displaying a single stat (Followers, Following, Coins, Hours). Uses high-contrast typography.

ProfileTabs.description: Custom tab navigation for Posts, Likes, Reposts, Replies with Framer Motion active indicator.

BadgesList.description: Horizontal scrolling list of user badges.

image_urls.description: Default user avatar for the profile
Soccer pitch abstract background for the profile cover

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Profile Page as a cohesive, mobile-first, RTL-supported experience for an Arab football social app.
Use framer-motion for the GlowingAvatar border to create a dynamic pulse/glow effect. Allow border color to be passed as a prop.
The layout MUST be strictly RTL. Ensure avatar is on the right, text aligns right. Use 'dir="rtl"' on the main container or rely on logical classes (e.g., right-6 in LTR becomes start-6).
For the StatCards, use a dense bento grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4). Make the numbers huge and bold (font-black text-2xl or 3xl, font-cairo).
Do not use generic gray boxes. Tint the backgrounds slightly with the primary color (e.g., bg-primary/5) or keep them deep background color with sharp 1px borders (border-border/40).
For the cover photo (AnimatedBackground), implement a slow, continuous zoom-in and out effect using Framer Motion to simulate a 'live' feeling.
Provide an 'Edit Mode' toggle state that transforms the avatar into an upload/generate zone and allows picking the glow color from a predefined list of sports team colors.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, tabs, inputs).
Maintain the existing CSS variables for theming as defined in index.css.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js or similar.
